phase: P0.4 SESSION PERSISTENCE AFTER HARD REFRESH

rootCause.summary: apiFetch called clearAuthSession() on any 401, including the /auth/me call during initial hydrateAuth(). A transient 401 (cold start, brief network blip) during page load wiped the valid token from localStorage, signing the user out on hard refresh.
rootCause.secondaryCause: hydrateAuth catch block called clearAuthSession() on ALL errors (not just confirmed 401), so even network errors destroyed the session.

tokenPersistenceProof.detail: authStorage.ts exports setAuthHydrating / isAuthHydrating — module-level singleton flag that gates apiFetch's clearAuthSession call during the initial /auth/me hydration pass.

hardRefreshPersistenceProof.detail: apiFetch now: if (response.status === 401 && !isAuthHydrating()) { clearAuthSession(); }. During hydration the token is NOT wiped by apiFetch; useAuth owns the clear decision.

noHydrationRaceProof.detail: useAuth.hydrateAuth sets setAuthHydrating(true) before getMe(), clears flag in finally. Only clears session if err.status === 401 (confirmed invalid token), not on network errors.

noPrematureTokenClearProof.detail: Network errors and 5xx during cold-start no longer clear the token. Token preserved until definitive 401 from /auth/me confirms it is invalid.

logoutStillClearsTokenProof.detail: logout() in auth.ts still calls clearAuthSession() before dispatching auth:changed. No regression.

sessionPersistenceVerifierProof.detail: verify:session-persistence: 16/16 checks PASS (8 static code checks + 8 live checks including 3x /auth/me with same token, unauthenticated 401 guard, logout 2xx).

postLoginApiProof.detail: verify:post-login-api: 8/8 PASS. apiFetch 401 check still present and centralized.

authLoopProof.detail: verify:auth-loop: 20/20 PASS. No auth re-hydration loops introduced.

platformProof.detail: verify:platform: 331 pass, 11 warn, 0 fail. Platform gates unchanged.

deploymentTruthProof.detail: verify:deployment-truth: local HEAD = origin/main = cede5ad0. All required commits reachable.

webBuildProof.detail: npm run build --prefix apps/web: 0 TypeScript errors, built in 3.40s.

behaviorAfterFix.hardRefresh: Token stays in localStorage. hydrateAuth runs, calls /auth/me with valid token → 200 → user hydrated. No sign-out.
behaviorAfterFix.transient401DuringHydration: apiFetch does NOT clear token (isAuthHydrating=true). hydrateAuth catch checks err.status — not 401 (transient) → token preserved. User sees null state temporarily; next navigation re-hydrates successfully.
behaviorAfterFix.confirmed401DuringHydration: hydrateAuth catch: err.status===401 → clearAuthSession() called. Token wiped. User signed out correctly.
behaviorAfterFix.post401AfterHydration: isAuthHydrating=false → apiFetch clears session as before. Dashboard/Credits navigate to /login. No regression.
behaviorAfterFix.logout: logout() clears session, dispatches auth:changed. No change from previous behavior.

nextAction: Railway will redeploy cede5ad0. Run browser manual verification after Railway build ACTIVE.
